textPlain: I appreciate that people are going beyond RAG and few shot prompting.
Great writeup. Are there any libraries that implement some of the methods described?
Rather than handcrafting solutions like it’s 1993, why not make robustness against forgetting part of the training objective?Let the search algorithm figure it out.

The reason you're getting slightly downvoted, I think, is that you need to answer this question first: which of the 15T tokens are you going to evaluate for forgetting?  And, please explain how doing that is different than doing another full epoch type pass over the weights.Some of the appeal here is that this architecture (handcrafted) allows ongoing gradient descent learning as you go on a much smaller set of weights.
